caption: The video showcases an aerial view of a large, open-pit mine with a striking turquoise water body at its center. The mine's terraced walls, carved into the earth, reveal layers of rock and soil, creating a dramatic contrast against the vibrant blue water. The surrounding landscape is a mix of barren, excavated areas and patches of green vegetation, indicating the extent of mining activity. The camera remains stationary, allowing viewers to take in the vast scale and intricate details of the mine's structure. The scene highlights the environmental impact of mining operations while also presenting a visually captivating geological formation.
